side_effects.description: Peptide not dissolving in BAC water even with up to 2.8ml; possible bad batch from Particle Peptides Europe

protocol_notes: Experienced peptide user (1.5 decades with GHRPs, GHRHs, Somatropin, Melanotan, IGF1-LR3) encountering a 10mg vial of TA1 from Particle Peptides (Europe) that will not dissolve. Attempted reconstitution with 2ml then 2.8ml BAC water without success.
